title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: at bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for at is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The "at" and "batch" utilities read commands from the standard input or from a specified file. The "at" utility specifies that a command will be run at a particular time. The "batch" utility executes commands when the system load levels drop to a particular level.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): at should use systemd-tmpfiles to create /var/spool/at/ and its contents [rhel-9] (JIRA:RHEL-110319)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
full_text:
An update for at is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The "at" and "batch" utilities read commands from the standard input or from a specified file. The "at" utility specifies that a command will be run at a particular time. The "batch" utility executes commands when the system load levels drop to a particular level.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): at should use systemd-tmpfiles to create /var/spool/at/ and its contents [rhel-9] (JIRA:RHEL-110319)
